channel.title: Aboutmes on Scepter914 Website

item.title: About me
item.description: Biography Profile Name: Satoshi Tanaka Apr. 2020 - Now, Tier IV, Inc. Autonomous Driving Sensing/Perception Engineer Twitter: @scepter914 Github: @scepter914 Blog: scepter914.github.io Work Experience Apr. 2020 - Now Tier IV, Inc. Autonomous Driving Sensing/Perception Engineer Internship Apr. 2018 - Apr. 2019, Internship at Preferred Networks, Inc. as a part-time engineer Aug. 2017 - Mar. 2018, Internship at Hitachi, Ltd as a research assistant Academic Background Master’s Degree in Information Science and Engineering, the University of Tokyo Apr.

item.title: 自己紹介
item.description: English version Biography Profile 田中 敬(たなか さとし) 2020/04-Now 株式会社ティアフォー Autonomous Driving Sensing/Perception Engineer Twitter: @scepter914 Github: @scepter914 Blog: scepter914.github.io Work Experience 2020/04-Now 株式会社ティアフォー Autonomous Driving Sensing/Perception Engineer Internship 2018/04-2019/03 Preferred Networks Part-time Engineer 2017/08-2018/03 株式会社日立製作所 研
